Description: Awarded upon completion of the Slithery Trivia Trial, this suspiciously squidgy Far Eastern ornament is supposed to represent the revered Great White Tsuchinoko.
An illustration of a starship, clipped from <Emphasis>The Thavnairian Truth</Emphasis>.
傘の部品に加工するための木材
Various lengths of timber ready to be sawn and lathed into parasol parts.
The promotional balloons contained herein were wrought especially for the Wachumeqimeqi appreciation sale.
